purpose: Tool-neutral image prompts for project-level Suming flying insect general and heavy carapace general character reference boards.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic chitin, old iron, insect-wax, membrane wing, blackstone snowline, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun emblem may appear only as a tiny copied physical rank plaque, wax seal, carapace brand, belt tag, or military hardware mark.
shared_rules.negative_prompt: human general, winged human, angel, bird-man, immortal, human warlord, humanoid boss, man in insect armor, helmeted soldier, knight armor, samurai armor, feather wings, human cloak wings, magic flight aura, Bai Yi duplicate, high official robe, Li Tang duplicate, slender mantis legs for heavy general, human face, human hair, human boots, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, large banner badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, modern military gear, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, high magic spell circle, gore, oversaturated game art

input_images.role: locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as tiny physical rank plaque or wax seal
locked symbol system for rank plaques, seals, brands, and military tags
insect-wax and bone-white seal material reference
blackstone, old iron, frost, and border-wall material reference
Li Tang contrast; flying general must use membrane wings and airborne posture rather than mantis blade-limb identity

prompts.image_prompt:
Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for a Suming Flying Insect General from the series Severed Homeland. Use the project references for low-magic eastern epic style, locked Suming/Qingming institutional materials, black-green chitin, translucent membrane wing, old iron, bone-white insect-wax seals, blackstone, and snowline frost. Do not redesign any badge. The subject is a high-ranking War-Armor Office airborne combat insect general used for wall dives, aerial reconnaissance, battlefield signaling, and vertical pursuit pressure. It must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid, not a winged human, not an angel, not a bird-man, not an immortal, and not a human general wearing wings. Scale reads 2.3 to 2.6 meters in-world, high rank but lighter and more airborne than Li Tang. Body has narrow hard chest and back carapace, compressed abdomen, shoulder-back wing roots, jumping and perching lower limbs, wall-gripping clawed feet, wide insect brow, dark compound eyes, bone-white mandible guard, short antenna bundle, dark-green neck membrane, no human face and no human hair. The most important feature is physical flight anatomy: two pairs of translucent black-green membrane wings, or upper hard wing covers plus lower thin membrane wings, rooted in shoulder-back carapace with bone-white insect-wax wing-root seal strips and old iron flight harness. Wings are not feathers, not cloak, not magic light.

Show three full-body states of the same flying general: 1) wall-perch command state, wings half-folded, clawed feet gripping blackstone parapet or roof edge, torso angled down, old iron flight harness, wing-root wax seals, dark-green command belt, small locked physical rank plaque, short throwing spear visible; 2) dive command state, full wing spread in a downward dive, short spear or hook-claw cable leading the motion, wing-edge bone spurs, wind-dusted wax seals, body streamlined but insectoid, physical wind pressure only and no magic aura; 3) snowline signal state, wings narrowed against wind, one clawed foot braced on blackstone, messenger bone whistle and command belt visible, snow dust on wing edges and clawed feet. Include silent detail panels with no text: wing root and old iron flight harness, translucent membrane and hard wing-cover fold lines, compound eyes and short antenna head, clawed perching foot gripping blackstone, short throwing spear, hook-claw cable, wing-edge bone spurs, messenger bone whistle, tiny locked rank plaque, material swatches for black-green membrane, deep-brown carapace, bone-white wax, old iron, dark-green belt, cold-gold pin, restrained dark-red scratch, and blackstone snow. Clean production reference board, no labels, no captions, no typography, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: winged human, angel, bird-man, immortal flying warrior, feather wings, human cloak wings, human general with wings, magic flight aura, glowing spell wings, Bai Yi wing cape, Li Tang duplicate, mantis blade-limb focus, human face, human hair, human boots, humanoid warrior, man in insect armor, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, large badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, gore, oversaturated game art

input_images.role: locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as tiny physical rank plaque or wax seal
locked symbol system for rank plaques, seals, brands, and military tags
insect-wax and bone-white seal material reference
blackstone, old iron, frost, and border-wall material reference
Li Tang contrast; heavy general must have a lower body much broader, heavier, and more siege-stable than Li Tang

prompts.image_prompt:
Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for a Suming Heavy Carapace General from the series Severed Homeland. Use the project references for low-magic eastern epic style, locked Suming/Qingming institutional materials, black-green heavy carapace, old iron, bone-white insect-wax seal rings, blackstone, and snowline frost. Do not redesign any badge. The subject is a high-ranking War-Armor Office siege and gate-pressure insect general used for gate locking, bridge pressure, shield pushing, and border-wall heavy defense. It must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid, not a human warlord in giant armor, not a giant knight, not a Northern beast, and not a Li Tang duplicate. Scale reads 2.7 to 3.1 meters in-world, broader and heavier than Li Tang. The required core difference: the lower body must be visibly thicker, wider, and more stable than Li Tang's lower body. Show massive segmented abdomen plates, heavy pelvic carapace, oversized hind limbs, large clawed feet, four to six thick support limbs or two huge hind limbs plus side support claws, low center of gravity, and a lower body planted like a mobile black-green gate. Do not use Li Tang's slender mantis legs or forearm blade identity. Head is low-set and armored, with deep narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, neck nearly buried in chest armor, no human face, no human hair, no human boots.

Show three full-body states of the same heavy general: 1) gate-lock pressure state, extremely wide lower body planted like a living gate, black iron gate shield or ram hammer vertical, heavy chest and back carapace, old iron heavy harness, bone-white wax seal rings, dark-green heavy command belt, tiny locked physical rank plaque; 2) gate-break advance state, head lowered, shoulder carapace forward, abdomen compressed downward, thick hind limbs pushing a ram hammer or shoulder impact, old iron hinge bands, iron chain hooks, cracked wax seal rings, restrained dark-red impact marks only; 3) snowline bulwark state, wide planted lower body under blackstone snow, gate shield angled against wind or attack, command belt and rank marks readable, lower limbs and clawed feet not hidden by snow. Include silent detail panels with no text: abdomen, pelvic armor, hind limbs and support claws visibly broader than Li Tang; low armored head with narrow compound eyes and thick mandible guard; old iron heavy harness and dark-green command belt; black iron gate shield, ram hammer, heavy short halberd, iron chain hooks; tiny locked rank plaque; material swatches for black-green heavy carapace, deep-brown abdomen armor, old iron, bone-white wax rings, dark-green belt, blackstone snow, muted dark-red impact mark. Clean production reference board, no labels, no captions, no typography, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: human warlord, giant knight armor, humanoid boss, man in heavy armor, Li Tang duplicate, slender mantis legs, forearm blade focus, fast mantis lunge, human face, human hair, human boots, Northern beast, orc, rock monster, generic monster, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, large badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, gore, oversaturated game art
